subcodes.title: Words to a Persian student, spoken on 1914-06-24
subcodes.first_line: Thou must strive day by day so that the fire of the Love of God may burn brighter and brighter upon the censer of thy heart
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @study; deepening, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @effort; striving
